risk_if_not_implemented: Without Roles With Special Protection Measures, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Human Resources Security Management
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of personnel security controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Human Resources Security Management (HRS-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Roles With Special Protection Measures (HRS-04.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with People applicability. Given the people-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory and contractual controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance (CPL-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Roles With Special Protection Measures (HRS-04.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with People applicability. Given the people-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
